articles.title: READERS GET IT LIVE, NEXT WEEK, FREE
articles.summary: Your first sales call now happens inside an AI answer.  You WIN by consistently producing credible, comprehensive, fresh content that your audience (and AI ANSWERS) can trust.

articles.title: CHATGPT IS SENDING LESS TRAFFIC TO WEBSITES, DOWN 52% IN A MONTH
articles.summary: Referral traffic from ChatGPT to websites has dropped steeply, with much of the citation share shifting towards Wikipedia and Reddit. Data from Profound shows that these answer-first platforms are now dominating ChatGPT citations, while branded websites that focus on conversions are losing visibility. The shift appears to be the result of OpenAI manually reweighting its retrieval system to prioritize direct, user-focused answers.

articles.title: FROM ‘HI [NAME]' TO AI: HAS TARGETING CROSSED THE LINE?
articles.summary: Data remains the most valuable resource for platforms and advertisers, and AI is accelerating its application in more sophisticated ways. What began with basic personalization has now expanded into intelligence-grade analytics, where the line between consumer marketing and surveillance becomes increasingly blurred. Companies exploring these strategies must weigh competitive advantage against ethical responsibilities and consumer trust, as the long-term viability of data-driven marketing depends on finding the balance.

articles.title: WIN REPORT: HOW TRUST SIGNALS TURNED SUSPICION INTO 16% MORE SIGNUPS
articles.summary: Party Hard Travel increased signups by 16% after addressing customer fears about scams and payment timing. Research showed that 11% of non-converting visitors cited scams as their top concern, while another 11% cited cost, which was more about coordinating group payments than affordability. To reduce these objections, the company added a benefits bar to its homepage that highlighted 40,000 annual bookings, a £30 deposit option, and a 4.8-star Trustpilot rating. The change reassured customers about legitimacy and flexibility, which led to more conversions.

articles.title: 5 RECOMMENDATIONS FOR BUILDING A REDDIT STRATEGY
articles.summary: Create or co-manage a brand subreddit to control your presence, and identify 3-5 relevant subreddits by researching priority keywords. Engage authentically for the first few weeks, following the 80/20 rule for brand mentions. Build relationships with active members and participate daily, aiming to comment early in new threads. This will help increase trust and visibility in search and AI results.

articles.title: HOW OPENAI'S HEAD OF B2B MARKETING RESPONDS TO EMAILS
articles.summary: Dane Vahey uses ChatGPT with the Gmail Connector to streamline email responses. He prompts it to summarize the last 20 unopened emails and draft short, personalized replies. ChatGPT outputs a copy-paste-ready list labeled by subject line. The full prompt is included in the post.

articles.title: LISTEN
articles.summary: Listen Labs is a customer research platform that automates the process of conducting and analyzing qualitative interviews. The platform recruits participants, conducts voice, video, or text-based interviews, and generates actionable insights within hours. It offers features such as automated report generation, persona creation, and theme identification.

articles.title: CEO GPT
articles.summary: A CEO GPT can capture a CEO's voice, style, and key phrases to simplify communications. Teams can feed it transcripts from podcasts, YouTube videos, and social posts, along with internal briefing materials. It can quickly generate authentic quotes, press briefings, and other content without hours of manual work. The tool can be updated over time to reflect evolving messaging.

articles.title: IS LINK BUILDING DEAD? (15 DATA STUDIES BEHIND THE CLICKBAIT)
articles.summary: Backlinks and referring domains still correlate strongly with higher Google rankings, with the top-ranking page having 3.8 times more backlinks than results in positions 2 to 10. Traditional link-building methods, such as guest posting and link insertions, have declined in value, as only 4.6% of sites offering such services were found to be high quality. Digital PR has become the most effective strategy, earning authoritative links and unlinked mentions that strengthen brand authority and visibility. AI Overviews cite top-ranking pages in over 90% of cases, but unlinked mentions are often more impactful than backlink volume for AI visibility. Link building is not dead, but it has shifted toward authority-focused digital PR and brand strategies rather than raw link quantity.

articles.title: TOP QUESTION TO ASK IN A STARTUP MARKETING INTERVIEW
articles.summary: Ask a startup, “What must be true before spending on paid media?” to see if marketing fundamentals are truly in place.

articles.title: THE 13 VIRAL MARKETING LAWS
articles.summary: These laws include the purple cow law, the 90-9-1 rules, and the golden hour law.

articles.title: TIKTOK'S NEW AI MANDATE IS GETTING BACKLASH FROM BIG ADVERTISERS
articles.summary: While smaller sellers praise GMV Max for efficiency and ROI protections, larger brands are concerned about its black-box nature and limited reporting, which complicates broader marketing strategies.
